title: Misleading claims on local government reorganisation

content.text: There have been misleading claims reported in the Times today saying that decisions on local government reorganisation are “gerrymandering”.
This is simply not true. These decisions are being made in line with the published criteria – not on a party political basis – as our statement makes clear.
“We completely reject these allegations. Decisions on local government reorganisation will be made transparently and in line with the published criteria – not on a party political basis.
“Our plans will speed up the construction of new homes and infrastructure, improve public services and boost regional growth to put more money in peoples’ pockets.”
For further information on the criteria: Letter: Essex, Southend-on-Sea and Thurrock - GOV.UK
